textByHash.1fadbce33631879acfdf7151b3b80b3fd6167d68: Well, to be honest... I'm not sure.
textByHash.20c6d883bfc9fbd131291529bbe062d6f743d58b: I should think it is probably because a warlock has come along and stolen my skull. If you look inside my coffin there, you'll find my corpse without a head on it.
textByHash.2191f84cd0878994fb39224bbcde2b8529b1af74: I'm impressed. You must be very powerful. I don't suppose you can stop me being a ghost?
textByHash.24a45c411487e304b9df0dddccee9980dda3aa70: I think it was one of the warlocks who lives in the big tower by the sea south-west from here.
textByHash.480054d9f833f730c4038f26cdc4456eb78b58ec: Nope. I just know I can't do much of anything like this!
textByHash.486881b22c721694d997f49b76e03a4bf0a79198: How are you doing finding my skull?
textByHash.5752818fcd3b8d85a88104d9812d90be323f05d9: Wooooooo woo! Wooooo woo wooooo woowoowoo woo Woo wooo. Wooooo woo woo? Woooooooooooooooooo!
textByHash.5eb0426341b6a5ca0464e083eba4f315a9b42ecf: Hurrah! Now I can stop being a ghost! You just need to put it in my coffin there, then I'll be free!
textByHash.5fcf4a0d997c4bb34ad7aa595ed9127bfe9b2317: I'm pretty sure it's somewhere in the tower south-west from here. There's a lot of levels to the tower, though. I suppose it might take a little while to find.
textByHash.63abc07818672000918cef4704a8b8ccb0daff3d: The first person I can speak to in ages...
textByHash.7eae2b0bf419bf659310a83a334b7d849679f5be: If you just put it in my coffin that should do the trick...
textByHash.8220d9a7adb98058ba65c7a83f97dad9e70d2067: Did you just understand what I said???
textByHash.8fceefabcfab048246f8accdfc392db4f4194194: Ooh, thank you. That would be such a great relief!
textByHash.a1948e63f2b2ba098de3a5564533bf249e4c30fb: Great. The first person I can speak to in ages...and they're a moron.
textByHash.ab2042eb54509426412e73000c5a37071d1bb79f: Hang on a second... you CAN understand me!
textByHash.b6c0c6fedb4a853315939d872d92607ba735e55b: Oh! It's your amulet that's doing it! I did wonder. I don't suppose you can help me? I don't like being a ghost.
textByHash.de85a919f54b63f069caff6f1b0bcbb709df2775: It is so dull being a ghost...
textByHash.ea22c4047dd5f1dbd5deb15efc9f7f0d035247a1: WOW! This is INCREDIBLE! I didn't expect anyone to ever understand me again!
textByHash.f194ad5ab641bc10bc7e757882733cd062b90275: Oh that's a pity. You got my hopes up there.
